    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    OmfComentCompiler
    COMPILER comment (class 0xE9) - Contains dependency file information or end-of-dependencies marker.
    class 
    OmfComentLibrarySearch
    LIBRARY_SEARCH comment (class 0xE8) - Contains source file metadata and timestamps.
    class 
    OmfComentTranslator
    TRANSLATOR comment (class 0x00) - Contains compiler/assembler name and version.
    class 
    OmfComentWeakExternals
    WEAK_EXTERNALS comment (class 0xA1) - Indicates object module extensions are present.
